title: Curaleaf Holdings Inc (CURLF) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Navigating Challenges
text: Curaleaf Holdings reported fourth quarter 2024 results with revenue of $331 million and net loss from continuing operations of $72 million, excluding noncash impairments. The adjusted EBITDA margin decreased by 110 basis points year-over-year to 23% in the fourth quarter. The company faced challenges in the New York market due to the influx of illicit cannabis products affecting the regulated market. However, most investments in automation and lighting were completed in 2024, with focus shifting to building inventory for premium flower offerings, aiming to increase premium flower revenue to 20-25% in its largest markets. Curaleaf maintained a market-leading position in the cannabis industry despite facing pricing pressures. The company's international segment continued to show strong momentum with 73% annual growth. Management outlined a strategy focused on enhancing operational efficiency and product quality while managing competitive pricing pressures in key domestic markets.
